74460.subject: Onchain Assets Weekly: 6/12/26
74460.body:
Onchain Assets Weekly

–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Securitize


–Р–≤—В–Њ—А: Securitize

    
    
    –Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞–є—В–µ —Ж—О —Б—В–∞—В—В—О –љ–∞ LinkedIn, —Й–Њ–± –њ—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
–Я—А–Њ—З–Є—В–∞—В–Є –љ–∞ LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61226-securitize-z28oc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BMaP4eLmiQ0S6SUaeIVhu6A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1W8tROVr6L0sk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqbcnom6~3c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqbcnom6-3c
  
This weekвАЩs highlights: Securitize CEO discusses IPO plans on Bloomberg; Securitize recognized by Fortune Crypto 100; Tokenized stocks could unlock $5T crypto market; and Securitize President on tokenization. Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo on Advancing IPO Plans | Bloomberg Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo says SPAC proceeds could help Securitize expand liquidity services and position the company for industry consolidation. WATCH NOW Fortune Crypto 100 Names Securitize a Top Crypto Services Company | Fortune Fortune named Securitize a top 10 Crypto Services company in its Fortune Crypto 100, the definitive ranking of the most influential companies in blockchain. READ MORE Securitize CEO Says Tokenized Stocks Could Unlock a $5T Crypto Market | CoinDesk At ETHConf, Carlos Domingo said moving stocks and ETFs onchain could open the door to a market much larger than todayвАЩs roughly $30B tokenized asset sector. READ MORE Are Tokenized Stocks the Next Big Catalyst? With Brett Redfearn | Talking Tokenization Podcast Securitize President Brett Redfearn traces tokenizationвАЩs shift from disruption to integration, with tokenized stocks, regulatory innovation, and onchain IPO access emerging as key themes. WATCH NOW
–Я—А–Є—Ф–і–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П –і–Њ –Њ–±–≥–Њ–≤–Њ—А–µ–љ–љ—П
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/onchain-assets-weekly-61226-securitize-z28oc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BMaP4eLmiQ0S6SUaeIVhu6A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1W8tROVr6L0sk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mqbcnom6~3c-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqbcnom6-3c
  
      

----------------------------------------

–¶–µ –њ–Њ–≤—Ц–і–Њ–Љ–ї–µ–љ–љ—П –µ-–њ–Њ—И—В–Њ—О –∞–і—А–µ—Б–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Њ —Г—З–∞—Б–љ–Є–Ї–Њ–≤—Ц Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)
–Ф—Ц–Ј–љ–∞—В–Є—Б—П, —З–Њ–Љ—Г –Љ–Є –≤–Ї–ї—О—З–Є–ї–Є —Ж—О —Ц–љ—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж—Ц—О https://www.linkedin.com/help/linkedin/answer/4788?lang=uk&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BMaP4eLmiQ0S6SUaeIVhu6A%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1W8tROVr6L0sk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-SecurityHelp-0-textfooterglimmer&trkEmail=eml-email_se

74458.subject: SambaNovaвАЩs SN50 Chip Could Be Faster Than NVIDIAвАЩs Blackwell B200 GPU
74458.body:
Series Sambanova-QP-1 offers exposure to a company taking aim at NVIDIA

Sambanova New Launch (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 )

Hi Oleg,

Everyone wants to talk about the challenges of training AI models.

But the real bottleneck may be inference, or an AI modelвАЩs ability to process new information.

Every $1 billion spent training an AI model can require up to $20 billion in inference costs.¬є

SambaNova (https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 ) is focused on solving that problem, with AI chips and software designed to help enterprises run AI workloads faster and more efficiently.

In fact, the company вАЩs fifth-gen SN50 chip outperformed NVIDIAвАЩs Blackwell B200 GPUs on internal inference tests, including 5X the maximum speed and over 3X the throughput.¬≤

As demand continues to grow, SambaNova has earned some notable endorsements:

- Est. $2.3B+ valuation from a Series E joined by IntelвАЩs VC arm and Vista Equity Partners.¬≥
- Multi-year deal with Intel to deliver cost-effective AI inference solutions.¬≥
- $1.4B+ raised to date from investors like BlackRock, Google, and SoftBank.¬≥

ThereвАЩs no guarantee that revenue, funding, or valuation will continue to grow for SambaNova, or that the company will be profitable. See the risk disclosures on the offering page.

With Series Sambanova-QP-1, qualified purchasers can gain exposure to a company building AI infrastructure for what many believe could be the next major phase of AI adoption.

View Opportunity
(https://dxszHp04.na2.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DR+113/dxszHp04/VVRF_V52lWlkW1sr4rm6bnNPsW5QKV2t5Qc5sZN1qZLsv3pyd0W8wLKSR6lZ3n3W8xBsYq6Gm342W84vklZ9dCkHCW5X56n21SyPC5W3xBhZD7CYjxFVkcmWD1L6rkzW1w96sL1X8lzyW4mLTjR5ScPZbW7lsV5S3HJQ5SW94Tq9K6wGRHzW8rQWmJ7FtphhN5CvrgdhClkLN31Nm4b_vpvVW6VvM024fpSW5W5NcWCr8lBRVKN9hGH5BDrLbYVH-Lgc83wFmGW3zpldH6dcbjKN1KR69rzm2cqW4gMSmf3ryfP8W2vBjKX571lVzV1fqW36yyGrJW25spVW4mvjkWW2H3xQw8PwQFsW1rVFt68R0WpfW5bTD9_27bfqpW8HK9C16MhDQvW8FQWLg8RvfdbW1PxT_c8FwqtCf8rTZnx04 )

Investment is in Series 5-3 (вАЬSeries Sambanova-QP-1вАЭ), which may hold SambaNova shares directly or thr

Bringing global finance onchain



¬†
Highlights
¬†
Aave V4 Crossed $150 Million Deposits
Aave V4 crossed $150 million deposits on June 11, up from roughly $42 million at the start of May. Supply and borrow caps have
been raised more than five times since launch to accommodate demand. Active loans doubled over the same period. Announcement here
[https://x.com/aave/status/2065118776069079441].
¬†
The first V4 incentive campaigns also recently went live for USDG [https://x.com/aave/status/2057459365590773864] and frxUSD
[https://x.com/aave/status/2057491720007192791].
¬†
Aave V4 Expansion Proposals for Avalanche and Arc
The Aave V4 multi-chain expansion is underway. Aave Labs published a Temp Check to deploy V4 on Avalanche
[https://x.com/aave/status/2059698790664225040] with a dedicated RWA Liquidity Hub. A second Temp Check proposes deploying Aave V4
on Arc [https://x.com/aave/status/2060422095935316179], the L1 built by Circle for digital dollar liquidity.
¬†
Aave Partners with Mastercard on Agent Pay for Machines
Mastercard introduced Agent Pay for Machines, a new operating model for commerce built for AI agents, launching with more than 30
partners. Aave provides the credit layer, giving agents the deepest liquidity in DeFi to borrow and earn. Announcement here
[https://x.com/Mastercard/status/2064690323683529210?s=20].
¬†
New Asset Listing Frameworks Proposed
Two new frameworks were proposed to govern assets across Aave V3, V4, and Aave Horizon. Aave Labs published a Technical Asset
Listing Framework [https://x.com/aave/status/2060146417478287725] that establishes technical requirements for asset listings.
LlamaRisk followed with a complementary Risk Framework [https://x.com/LlamaRisk/status/2064301532086956352] that sets standards
for evaluating asset, bridge, and chain-level risk.
¬†
Bitwise Now On Aave Horizon
Bitwise became the investment manager of USCC, now the Bitwise Crypto Carry Fund, a tokenized fund that earns yield through a
market-neut

74452.subject: рЯФЈ The Daily: SpaceX IPO tokenized allocations canceled
74452.body:
SEC's proposal to scrap key NMS rules a major unlock for tokenized US stocks: analysts | Appeals court rejects Sam Bankman-Fried's bid for new trial in FTX fraud case | Metaplanet to acquire Siiibo Securities for $13 million to develop bitcoin-linked yield products | US spot Bitcoin ETFs set to hit $2 trillion cumulative trading volume milestone amid mounting outflows |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Friday рЯОЙ *SpaceX* began trading today, with some analysts warning ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404324/elon-musks-spacex-ipo-could-become-bitcoins-latest-headwind?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) that the blockbuster IPO could become *bitcoin's* latest headwind, drawing capital away from crypto.

In today's newsletter, several crypto platforms cancel their tokenized *SpaceX* IPO allocations, the *SEC* proposes scrapping key NMS rules, the *U.S. Court of Appeals* rejects *SBF's* bid for a new trial, and more.

Meanwhile, early *Airbnb* and *DoorDash* backer *Y Combinator* expects ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404643/early-airbnb-doordash-backer-y-combinator-expects-crypto-to-be-used-by-every-one-of-its-portfolio-companies?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) crypto to be used by "every" one of its portfolio companies.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вАФ and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рЯЪА Bybit, Binance, Bitget Wallet cancel tokenized SpaceX IPO allocations after share shortage*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404644/bybit-binance-bitget-cancel-tokenized-spacex-ipo-allocations-share-shortage?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Bybit* , *Binance* , and *Bitget Wallet* canceled planned allocations of tokenized shares for *Elon Musk's* *SpaceX* IPO after failing to secure enough underlying stock to fulfill customer demand.

* Bybit said *xStocks* was unable to deliver the underlying assets, leaving the exchange with no allocation to distribute to users.
* Bitget Wallet also blamed a shortage of available allocations and said subscribers would receive full refunds, including fees.
* Binance canceled its *SPCXx* IPO campaign, refunded all locked *USDC* , and pledged a share of a $1 million airdrop of its upcoming *bStocks* *SPCXB* token.
